import { useState } from 'react'; import { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext'; import { SCHOLARSHIPS, PLANNER_DAYS, ADMIN_STUDENTS } from '../data'; // ───────────────────────────────────────────── // RESUME BUILDER // ───────────────────────────────────────────── export function ResumeBuilder() { const { user } = useAuth(); const [form, setForm] = useState({ name: user?.name || 'Rahul Sharma', email: user?.email || 'rahul@example.com', phone: user?.phone || '+91 98765 43210', city: user?.city || 'Delhi, India', linkedin: user?.linkedin || 'linkedin.com/in/rahulsharma', github: user?.github || 'github.com/rahulsharma', objective: user?.objective || 'Aspiring software engineer with strong foundation in CSE fundamentals, seeking to leverage academic excellence and problem-solving skills in a dynamic tech environment.', skills: user?.skills || 'Python, C++, Java, React, Machine Learning, SQL, Git', }); const [preview, setPreview] = useState({ ...form }); const set = (k, v) => setForm(f => ({ ...f, [k]: v })); const buildResume = () => setPreview({ ...form }); const skillList = preview.skills.split(',').map(s => s.trim()).filter(Boolean); return (

Generate a professional AI-crafted resume and download as PDF

set('name', e.target.value)} />
